scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run ml:setup
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix brainbridge-backend && npm install --prefix brainbridge-frontend
scripts.ml:setup: cd brainbridge-backend/ml_service && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND,ML" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
